purpose: Falsify, never optimize, the already-passed fixed venue-transfer candidate.

fixed_inputs.cost_scenario: stress: 60 bp per unit absolute turnover
fixed_inputs.funding_stress: double every positive funding value paid by a long; retain negative funding receipts unchanged
fixed_inputs.concentration_stress: replace every return in the single best calendar month with zero

gate: all weight neighbors remain above the 4% annual full-capital hurdle
all weight neighbors keep max drawdown above -12%
doubled positive funding remains above the 4% annual full-capital hurdle
doubled positive funding keeps max drawdown above -12%
removing the best month still remains above the 4% annual full-capital hurdle
bootstrap probability of positive total return is at least 80%
bootstrap probability of exceeding the 4% annual hurdle is at least 65%
falsification: Any failed check stops robustness support. No variant may replace the 25%/25% candidate and no threshold may be changed after seeing results.
